meta.title: Disclaimer | AWSoversea
meta.description: Read the AWSoversea disclaimer regarding the use of our website, logistics information, and services.

hero.title: Disclaimer
hero.subtitle: Please read this disclaimer before relying on the information provided on our website.

sections.title: General Information
sections.content: The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only and may change without prior notice.

sections.title: No Legal Advice
sections.content: Shipping regulations, customs requirements, and international trade rules vary by country. Customers should seek professional advice where necessary.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. AWSoversea is not responsible for their content or privacy practices.

sections.title: Service Availability
sections.content: Certain logistics services may not be available in every country or region and may change without notice.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: AWSoversea is not responsible for losses resulting from circumstances beyond our reasonable control, including customs delays, force majeure events, or government restrictions.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For any questions regarding this disclaimer, please contact AWSoversea.
